data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a weather contingency for outdoor spaces, specifically the mention of a tent weather backup option. However, the evidence does not confirm the implementation or enforcement of this contingency plan, as it only states that there is a tent option without detailing how it is activated or verified in case of inclement weather. This indicates a gap in the validation process, as the requirement is not fully covered by the existing evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or enforcement of the tent weather backup option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
